description: You are working on an Android app called 'ShopEasy' in Android Studio. The product team wants deep link support so users can open product pages directly from URLs. Implement this by creating DeepLinkActivity.kt at app/src/main/java/com/example/shopeasy/DeepLinkActivity.kt. The activity must extend AppCompatActivity, use the layout R.layout.activity_deep_link, and extract the product ID from the last path segment of the intent data URI. Create the layout file activity_deep_link.xml at app/src/main/res/layout/activity_deep_link.xml containing at least one TextView. Register DeepLinkActivity in app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml with an intent filter supporting the 'https' scheme, 'shopeasy.example.com' host, and '/product' path prefix, including the VIEW action and the DEFAULT and BROWSABLE categories. The project must build successfully after these changes.
